title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Amazon Books India Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Amazon Books India Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Amazon Books India Holdings Services in Bengaluru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Amazon Books India Holdings Services:
Amazon Books India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amazon Books India Holdings Services!
